Are the event stages better than the regular farming stages?
Yes
/ covenant command isn't working
E1 and e3
ping a mod to fix it

All event stages are far more valuable while there are still limited items in the shop.
The Hameln event stage is crazy more valuable even after shop is exhausted. 
Some other event stage rewards (like Saya stage) are more comparable to the regular interludes in the long term (after limited items are gone), especially if you don't have a high bonus%.
Remember there is a bonus currency multiplier if you own the Awakener, their SSR wheel and their SR wheel (maxes out at 3 extra copies of each for +150% currency bonus)
so the more copies you have the more valuable it is to farm the stage
but hameln stage is not about the currency, just the regular rewards like the xp flasks

what is the difference between arachnne ultra and the normal ultra if there is one?

Singularity Ultra (or SUltra) gives a massive buff to your cards by existing, additionally when annihilating you instead get the leftmost card back from ultra space with massive buffs… drawback is annihilation is 3 turn cooldown, ultra turn is now also a turn extension instead of a new turn altogether which is both a good thing for some things and a bad thing for others 

(Description from bagel)

Nodens also appears in the compilation of various texts that constitute the modern Cult of the Ancient Ones—a work known as the *Covenant of the Dead* or *Kitab al-Azif*.
